title: Akynite E14 LED Bulbs R50 Dimmable 5W, Warm White 2700K, 500LM, 120° Wide Angle, Equivalent to E14 40W Halogen, AC 230V, R50 SES Small Screw LED Mushroom Bulbs, Pack of 4
features: ★【Dimmable】: This R50 E14 LED bulb is dimmable (SCR, Triac mode) and requires a SCR thyristor control switch (compatible with LED bulbs) to function properly. Supports stepless dimming and is compatible with rotary dimming switch. Not compatible with three-stage switch and touch switch!

★【E14 Spotlight Bulb】: R50 LED spotlight with E14 small Edison screw, Ø50*85mm, warm white 2700k, beam angle of 120 degrees, very suitable for replacing the old filament reflector bulbs. The lampshade is white and nice, which is ideal for installation on the visible lamp.

★【Energy Saving】: LED E14 R50 ses light bulb soft white 2700k, with 12*2835 SMD LED, 500LM. E14 5W LED is an ideal replacement for E14 40w halogen bulb, which can reduce energy consumption by more than 85%. Ideal lighting for range hood or workbench.

★【Stable Quality】: Dimmable spotlight R50 with small screw fitting. Instant lighting. The 120° beam angle ensures a wide light field. Aluminum helps the lamp quickly dissipate heat. The average life span is 20,000 hours. Good for multi-beam ceiling lights in bedroom.

★【Application】: Ideal for dining room, kitchen, workbench, range hood, bathroom, bedroom, living room, stairwell, corridor, study room, showcase, cafe, restaurant, office, shop window, etc. Suitable for floor lamp, ceiling lamp, wall lamp, table lamp, etc.
description: Product Description LED Spotlight Bulbs R50 E14 5W Dimmable 120° wide beam angle Immediate lighting Aluminium fast heat dissipation Beautiful shape, ideal for decorative lighting Applications: Ideal for dining room, kitchen, workbench, bathroom, bedroom, living room, stairwell, corridor, study room, showcase, cafe, restaurant, office, shop window, etc. Suitable for floor lamp, ceiling lamp, wall lamp, table lamp, etc. Warm Tips Before Purchase: This R50 E14 LED is dimmable and works with LED dimmer switch . The dimming technology is "SCR, TRIAC" . Not compatible with touch lamp or 3-level dimmable lamp. Incompatibility will cause flicker and the lights dead off. Not compatible with lamps with ballast. Attention: It might be possible that the light bulb flash on the highest or lowest setting when connected. But that is not a quality issue. We suggest you to adjust to a proper range. 85% Energy Saving Spotlight bulb E14 R50 LED 5W is an ideal replacement for E14 40 watt halogen bulb, which can reduce energy consumption by more than 85%. Aluminum material can effectively extend product life (20,000hrs). Warm White 2700K -500LM R50 LED dimmable warm white 2700k with E14 small Edison screw, Ø50*85mm, easy to install. 500LM with 12 SMD LEDs, the 120° beam angle ensures a wide light field. The lampshade is white and nice, which is ideal for installation on the visible lamp. Comfortable Light CRI>80Ra, high color rendering index for vivid and natural colors. No flicker, no glare, the light is soft and comfortable, prevent eye fatigue. Immediate lighting, no warm up. Akynite R50 E14 LED Bulbs bring you wonderful visual enjoyment!
